description: Legal fragment. Dating: mentions Av 1486 of the Seleucid Era = July/August 1175 CE. Describing how after lengthy litigation it was determined that  [...] known as Ibn ʿAbdallah owed 3 dinars to the elder al-Asʿad. (Information in part from CUDL.) Handwriting of Mevorakh b. Natan?
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
